title: Crown Castle International: Buy This Inflation-Crushing REIT And Sleep Well At Night
text: In March 2022, the Consumer Price Index reading reached its highest level since December 1981. The essential nature of mobile data and Crown Castle International's leading portfolio of physical assets in the U.S. position the stock for strong future growth.

title: Crown Castle (CCI) Beats on Q1 FFO Estimates, Raises View
text: Amid robust 5G leasing environment and elevated tower space demand, Crown Castle (CCI) displays healthy top-and-bottom line growth. It issues an upbeat 2022 outlook.

title: Crown Castle (CCI) Surpasses Q1 FFO and Revenue Estimates
text: Crown Castle (CCI) delivered FFO and revenue surprises of 3.89% and 2.38%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Crown Castle Announces First Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call Details
text: HOUSTON, April 06, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Crown Castle International Corp. (NYSE: CCI) ("Crown Castle") plans to release its first quarter 2022 results on Wednesday, April 20, 2022, after the market closes. In conjunction with the release, Crown Castle has scheduled a conference call for Thursday, April 21, 2022, at 10:30 a.m. eastern time. The conference call may be accessed by dialing 800-458-4121 and asking for the Crown Castle call (access code 8859825) at least 30 minutes prior to the start time. The conference call may also be accessed live over the Internet at http://investor.crowncastle.com. Any supplemental materials for the call will be posted on the Crown Castle website at http://investor.crowncastle.com.
